headline: How The S&P Global (SPGI) Narrative Is Shifting With Issuance, AI And Valuation Revisions
summary: S&P Global’s fair value estimate has been nudged higher from US$537.90 to US$538.52, a tiny move that still signals fresh thinking about where the stock might sit long term. Recent research shows analysts reworking their price targets in both directions as they weigh issuance trends, information services growth, and new questions around competition and AI. Read on to see what is driving these shifting views and how you can track the evolving S&P Global story. Analyst Price Targets don't...

headline: How the big oil and gas CEOs think the Iran war supply disruption will play out
summary: The oil industry's grim outlook for global oil and gas supplies stands in contrast to the Trump administration's promise that the disruption is short term.

headline: Analysis: A new oil shock is building. The next few weeks of war will be decisive for the economy.
summary: Energy markets are starting to reflect the growing risk of physical supply disruptions.
